events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper, known for her distinctive image and powerful four-octave vocal range, was born on this day in 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: It's Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday! Still bringing the fun and those incredible vocals. What's your favourite Cyndi track?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: British singer-songwriter George Michael, who rose to fame with Wham! and achieved global superstardom as a solo artist, was born on this day in 1963.

angles.name: A True Icon
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: The 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who would have been 68 this year, passed away on this day in 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the incomparable Michael Jackson. His music and influence continue to reign supreme.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr (born Richard Starkey), celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Keep on drumming, Ringo.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic lead guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian Harold May, was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Michael Philip Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the inimitable Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever. Remember the first video they played? The irony is still golden.

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever', was released on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A quarter-century since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. What an album to kick off a legendary career. What's your top track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, Woodstock brought half a million people together for three days of peace, love, and incredible music.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: The 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year, passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His legacy as the King of Rock and Roll remains unmatched.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year, was shot dead in Las Vegas on this day in 1996.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the world lost a lyrical genius. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his profound impact on music.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year, passed away on this day in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost Jimi Hendrix, but his revolutionary guitar work still sounds as fresh as ever.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album, Iconic Cover
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years of Abbey Road! That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer-songwriter and frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Legend
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the phenomenal Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are truly timeless.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, was born on this day in 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that swagger and those anthems.

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic album 'Imagine', featuring the timeless title track, was released on this day in 1971.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple introduced the original iPod, which revolutionised portable music listening, on this day in 2001.

angles.name: Pocket Full Of Music
angles.copy: Remember when you could fit 1,000 songs in your pocket? Today marks 25 years since Apple launched the original iPod.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune? Licence to thrill!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The iconic co-founder of The Beatles, singer-songwriter and peace activist John Lennon, was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Remembering A Legend
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations.
